title: Water Weight (Item Buoyancy)
description: This datapack makes items have an assigned weight value, which affects how buoyant it is in water.
body:
# Water Weight 
### (Item Buoyancy)

Minecraft items clearly should have different weights, right? Well, I gave them some. Now items are affected by this weight while in water. Heavier items sink, and lighter items float.

So, now items float differently simply based on weight - cool, right? Enjoy!

### Several Minecraft versions
It works for Minecraft versions 1.21.x (and likely further). Be aware that in most versions, a warning may appear that it is for the wrong version, but gor some older versions, it may work.

## Created by NightML, aka NightMareLore. 

Taking suggestions for resourcepacks via email: nightmarelore.10@gmail.com

Please enjoy! But, don't feel inclined to download it, if it isn't your style.
Though there is no active content, music videos will be eventually uploaded to **@NightMareLore10** on YouTube. [Please subscribe for more updates - completely free!]

## Will Likely Update Fairly Often (as of October 21, 2025)
